name: surfexp_gateways
title: Surface Export Gateways
author: solarcloud7
description: Surfaceless 'gateway' space-locations for the surface_export Clusterio plugin. A space platform that routes to and parks at a gateway is transferred to the linked instance. Pure data-stage mod (no control.lua); also ships the selection-lab-tool debug prototype (logic in the module) — all gateway logic lives in the save-patched surface_export module.
